name: Cory Booker
subject: An all-white debate stage
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Today is the deadline to qualify for the DNC's January debate. And currently, no candidate of color will be on the stage. Team, Today is the deadline to qualify for the DNC's January debate. Once again, it's looking like we're going to see a debate stage next week that doesn't reflect the true diversity of our party. I know I've written to you about this topic a few times now -- and it pains me to have to do so. But, it is deeply problematic that a Democratic primary field that started as the most diverse in history will almost certainly feature no candidates of color in the next debate. **This lack of diversity doesn 't represent the ideals of our party -- and it doesn't represent the ideals of our country.** The DNC's debate thresholds have had the effect of cutting off access to the debate stage for candidates of color who deserve to be heard in this election. There have barely been any polls in the field that would allow a campaign like ours to demonstrate momentum and qualify for the debate. **I 'm going to keep speaking out about this and forcing our party to have the difficult discussions we need to be having. If you're with me, please chip in.** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cory2020-january?refcode=em_fr_20200110_CB_20200110-fr-CB-EM2-SS_SS_express5&amount=5&express_lane=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amounts=5,10,22,50,100")

At the December debate, it was clear that not nearly enough attention was devoted to the challenges facing communities of color. We can't let these important issues be left out of the conversation.
I plan to keep fighting and making my case directly to voters and caucus-goers in the early states. **[I'd be grateful if you can chip in now to help us do it.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cory2020-january?refcode=em_fr_20200110_CB_20200110-fr-CB-EM2-SS_SS_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**
I'm in this race to win -- because I believe that I can unite the diverse coalition we'll need to defeat Donald Trump this November.
Together, we will rise.
Cory
[](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cory2020-january?refcode=em_fr_20200110_CB_20200110-fr-CB-EM2-SS_SS_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0fec/5fca0d19/7b674ae1/291d23e9/2856057678/VEsHBQ/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0fec/5fca0d19/7b674ae1/291d23e8/2856057678/VEsHBA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0fec/5fca0d19/7b674ae1/291d23f7/2856057678/VEsHBw/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0fec/5fca0d19/7b674ae1/291d23f6/2856057678/VEsHBg/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0fec/5fca0d19/7b674ae1/291d23ea/2856057678/VEsHAQ/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").

name: Fair Fight PAC
subject: We have a big announcement to make...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight PAC, www
body:
We're launching a major fundraising campaign to restore purged voters and add new voters in Georgia. |
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa592/34a064cc/1b7d20a8/70351d0/248271679/VEsH/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://fairfight.com/")

| | | Friend - Because of your support, Fair Fight Action's litigation and advocacy efforts kept 26,500 voters on the rolls -- voters who otherwise would have been purged. Fair Fight is working every day to build power for the right to vote. But more work remains. Nearly 100,000 Georgians remain off the rolls, simply because they have chosen not to vote in recent elections. **So today, we have a pretty big announcement: We 're launching a major fundraising campaign to restore purged voters and add new voters in Georgia.** We're matching up to $25,000 in donations to this email to support civic organizations that do voter registration work in Georgia. But we need your help to get there. [**All proceeds from this email will be divided equally between voter registration groups in Georgia and Fair Fight is matching the donations to the groups. Will you chip in to help us support our allies on the frontlines?**](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa592/34a064cc/1b7d20a8/70351d1/248271679/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUwMTEwMjBWUlMtMS1hIn0%3D/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fairfight-2020?refcode=IE011020VRS-1-a") **[DONATE](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa592/34a064cc/1b7d20a8/70351d1/248271679/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUwMTEwMjBWUlMtMS1hIn0%3D/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fairfight-2020?refcode=IE011020VRS-1-a")** Your support will go a long way to make sure these groups can keep working so that all eligible Georgians can make their voices heard. Change happens when we invest in the fight on the ground. We appreciate your support and your efforts to fight with us. Thank you for your continued support. \- Team Fair Fight
---

|
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa592/34a064cc/1b7d20a8/70351de/248271679/VEsC/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.facebook.com/FairFightAction/") [](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa592/34a064cc/1b7d20a8/70351df/248271679/VEsD/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://twitter.com/fairfightaction/") [](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa592/34a064cc/1b7d20a8/70351dc/248271679/VEsA/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.instagram.com/fairfightaction/")

name: Amber Davis
subject: My mom needs fighters like you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wendy Davis for Congress
body:
I saw the outpouring of support my mom received during that filibuster six years ago...
[](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.%3D%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/wdfc_email?refcode=jtk27-fr-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1&amount=3")
[](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.%3D%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/wdfc_email?refcode=jtk27-fr-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1&amount=3")
Friend -
Watching my mom, Wendy Davis, filibuster an anti-abortion bill for 13 hours straight in those pink shoes of hers was a true inspiration for me and women across the country. But that's the mom I know and love: She always motivates those around her to fight for what's right.
**In a moment, I 'm going to ask you to make a donation to my mom's campaign - but first, give me a chance to explain why she's counting on your support.**
From raising me and my sister Dru to being an amazing "Bubbie" to my daughters, I've never seen my mom back down when the going gets tough. She always works hard, especially for the women in her life.
But as we enter this pivotal election year, my mom needs fighters like you in her corner - fighters that will show up for a critical race like this and make sure Mom has a chance to win on Election Day. **I saw the outpouring of support my mom received when she filibustered that anti-abortion bill in the Texas Senate seven years ago. Right now, she needs you to show up again. Big time.**
So I'm asking you to join our Pink Sneaker Squad. Your support today will create the strongest team possible to help my mom flip TX-21 from red to blue and send Chip Roy packing. **[Can I count on you to make a donation today to join our 2020 Pink Sneaker Squad, flip this Texas House seat blue and expand our Democratic majority?](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.%3D%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/wdfc_email?refcode=jtk27-fr-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1&amount=3")**
[](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.%3D%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/wdfc_email?refcode=jtk27-fr-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1&amount=3")
Your support means the world to my family and me. Thank you so much for being in Mom's corner.
Amber

If you'd like to support Wendy Davis for Congress, you can [click here to make a donation](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361aee/704929dc/16150a08/39938bd8/2091917961/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2RmY19lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMjctZnItbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCIsImUzc2dZV0p5WldOMWNuSnBibWNnZlgwPSI6IiZyZWN1cnJpbmc9MSJ9/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/wdfc_email?refcode=jtk27-fr-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1").
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can [click here](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361aee/704929dc/16150a08/39938bdb/2091917961/VEsA/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://wendyforcongress.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/fewer-emails").
[To unsubscribe from the Wendy Davis for Congress email list, please click here.](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361aee/704929dc/16150a08/39938bda/2091917961/VEsB/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://wendyforcongress.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe")
Paid for by Wendy Davis for Congress

name: Heather Hargreaves
subject: Yesterday’s news:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TOM STEYER 2020]()
body:
| | | |
---
---
**Two polls were released yesterday afternoon, putting Tom second in South Carolina with 15% and third in Nevada with 12%.** This proves to the country something that we’ve known all along — Tom’s message is resonating and our momentum is real! This doesn't happen overnight — it happens because of strong support from people like you, friend. We've been seeing this enthusiasm grow every day as folks come out to hear Tom and more volunteers sign up to share his message. Now, everyone across the country can see what we’re seeing on the ground. [_**Thank you for all you've done to help us reach this milestone. Now it's time to show everyone that Tom’s momentum is here to stay. Will you commit to vote?**_](http://clicks.tomsteyer.com/wf/click?upn=cBSXlkRq21E9V5onLqLCBguGO1iUd2XLcKbWoq181-2BUyGhFr5DPUD-2BLMWSZdz4ZwSvO6DTsCIhv-2BblLe13-2BKafL4OGK-2BfARC3V37Nx8NYmnniy1LrhRC9OUiLeU5VUSAQ9m28MvD3-2FPi4hQk-2Bd3C05noGpPzEOdj9WGiLVQuO-2B4aSZKoJPFui7uZO5lgTRRd7hpZiREMTIPrtq1ku5LYl2ikwD2VIuUkNRkRtQcN7ds-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFCgEVvHZJIBnVwrwztgYJz4eFq9BMkyZwT1fV8gU3hTKgydBXEIdOTn-2BDH-2Bd74DFdlgEEUVzurJo-2Bub8JT8eBvZaoODF9m3u-2B1lBerYhyDD0cfaP6bdhatN5VAkF4IqtyleCERt7t4yaOuOCC-2FOQwoyFfyezqbgqPoUe4V143oO5vNkajHPm9JUETMdSB6Q7cPL1sEGFxwSo1hU0ieevkY0cdW6tloelcT28ugKCTzblTATpjnBOV0Vm7FHp0AJ3Cim16X-2F6Z-2BwOPueyEs3xEmlEvxkm-2FJ-2BiBxk5yeloe0H-2Faw68G3upBSUr6B9BcaxcJT-2FqD-2BOdkaz-2FR-2FmUP503DL2q2uOB2lwVLgX0MZo5icBo2x9wCdOOT2NWKXWMO6csISoQikRjygxJ6M33fybuuO2-2BqcId2IowYKbr33RhLp7Q-3D-3D) Tom has only been in this race for six months and is already polling ahead of candidates who have had the spotlight for much longer. Voters are ready to tackle the climate crisis, break the corporate stranglehold on our democracy, and build a government that listens to the people — and these numbers prove it. **This exciting jump in the polls also means that Tom will be on the Democratic National Committee’s debate stage on Tuesday, January 14.** This debate is another chance to show the country that Tom is the best candidate to defeat Donald Trump and expose him as a fraud and a failure — especially when it comes to the economy. Feeling the momenTOM (I couldn’t help myself),
Heather

clean_body: | | | | Two polls were released yesterday afternoon, putting Tom second in South Carolina with 15% and third in Nevada with 12%. This proves to the country something that we’ve known all along — Tom’s message is resonating and our momentum is real! This doesn't happen overnight — it happens because of strong support from people like you, friend. We've been seeing this enthusiasm grow every day as folks come out to hear Tom and more volunteers sign up to share his message. Now, everyone across the country can see what we’re seeing on the ground. Tom has only been in this race for six months and is already polling ahead of candidates who have had the spotlight for much longer. Voters are ready to tackle the climate crisis, break the corporate stranglehold on our democracy, and build a government that listens to the people — and these numbers prove it. This exciting jump in the polls also means that Tom will be on the Democratic National Committee’s debate stage on Tuesday, January 14. This debate is another chance to show the country that Tom is the best candidate to defeat Donald Trump and expose him as a fraud and a failure — especially when it comes to the economy. Feeling the momenTOM (I couldn’t help myself), Heather | | | "Facebook " | "Twitter " | "Instagram " ---|---|--- | Thank you for being a part of this campaign! body:

| Team, we're bumping Michael's email from earlier.

[We're working toward a crucial fundraising deadline next week, and we need to raise $100,000 this weekend to stay on track. We're already up $10,000 since this morning, but we need to keep it going.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba83d/134673f2/8e398d1/69977a79/592677567/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B3_011020_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

Why?

Two-thirds of New Hampshire Democratic voters are still undecided.

Billionaires are flooding the airwaves with ads.

_Michael can win this race if we get his message in front of as many people as possible!_

[We have something better than limitless bank accounts - we have the support of grassroots activists like you.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba83d/134673f2/8e398d1/69977a79/592677567/VEsE/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B3_011020_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

Friend: [In a moment, I'm going to ask you to make your first donation to my campaign, but first let me tell you why.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba83d/134673f2/8e398d1/69977a79/592677567/VEsD/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B3_011020_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

When my team announced that we needed to raise $700,000 by January 16th, we knew it would be a tough goal to hit.

I crunched the numbers with my finance team, and I wanted to keep you updated:

[We need to raise $100,000 over this weekend in order to stay on track to hit our goal by Thursday.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba83d/134673f2/8e398d1/69977a79/592677567/VEsA/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B3_011020_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

It's no secret that I've been an underdog in this race.

So far, we've gotten by on a shoestring budget by being smart and scrappy.

But now is the time to dig in and work together to reach this crucial goal, team.

[If we keep airing our ads, knocking doors, and reaching out to the 67% of Democratic voters still undecided in this race - we can win in New Hampshire.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba83d/134673f2/8e398d1/69977a79/592677567/VEsHBg/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B3_011020_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

name: ElizabethWarren.com
subject: POLLING ALERT: It's a dead heat in Iowa
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President

Now, the Des Moines Register just released a new poll that has Elizabeth in a close second in Iowa. **CNN: Iowa poll shows close 4-way race ahead of caucuses
Bernie Sanders: 20%
Elizabeth Warren: 17%
Pete Buttigieg: 16%
Joe Biden: 15%**

[**Donate $2 to help Elizabeth win >>**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852ba53/45c30650/1ee25471e/66ff4fd9/3611319932/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWphbjIwZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTjQ3Rl9SRVNfTlVNX0NfMjAyMDAxMTBfVjFTNF9QX1QxIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-jan20fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMN47F_RES_NUM_C_20200110_V1S4_P_T1")
We have the team, the momentum, and the heart it's going to take to win this whole thing.

Get this: This month has already been our best start to any fundraising month since we launched this grassroots movement -- _just_ after having our best-ever end-of-quarter, best day, and best hour of fundraising at the close of December.

Now, the _Des Moines Register_ just released a new poll that has Elizabeth in a close second in Iowa. In fact, all four top candidates are within the poll's margin of error -- meaning any one of them could win. **This race is going to come down to which campaign has the most people make calls, knock on doors, and bring in the most grassroots donations in the next three weeks.**

[**We have the ground game to win this race -- but Elizabeth is not going to get there without your help. Rush a donation of $2 or whatever you can and help this grassroots movement expand our efforts in Iowa at this critical moment.**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852ba53/45c30650/1ee25471e/66ff4fd9/3611319932/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWphbjIwZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTjQ3Rl9SRVNfTlVNX0NfMjAyMDAxMTBfVjFTNF9QX1QxIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-jan20fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMN47F_RES_NUM_C_20200110_V1S4_P_T1")

We're just over three weeks from Iowa and this poll shows what we already know: **What we're doing is working.**

And we know what we need to keep doing in Iowa and everywhere -- talk with caucus-goers and voters from the heart about Elizabeth's plans for big, structural change.

We do that by running an unbeatable ground operation, and our job now is to make sure our organizers on the ground in Iowa have all the resources they need to get the most Iowans to the caucuses as possible.

[**Your donation could make all the difference. Chip in $2, or whatever is possible right now, and help push this grassroots movement to the top of the pack.**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852ba53/45c30650/1ee25471e/66ff4fd9/3611319932/VEsEDQ/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWphbjIwZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTjQ3Rl9SRVNfTlVNX0NfMjAyMDAxMTBfVjFTNF9QX1QxIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-jan20fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMN47F_RES_NUM_C_20200110_V1S4_P_T1")

**Two polls were released yesterday afternoon, putting Tom second in South Carolina with 15% and third in Nevada with 12%.** This proves to the country something that we’ve known all along — Tom’s message is resonating and our momentum is real! This doesn't happen overnight — it happens because of strong support from people like you, friend. We've been seeing this enthusiasm grow every day as folks come out to hear Tom and more volunteers sign up to share his message. Now, everyone across the country can see what we’re seeing on the ground. [_**Thank you for all you've done to help us reach this milestone. Now it's time to show everyone that Tom’s momentum is here to stay. Will you commit to vote?**_](http://clicks.tomsteyer.com/wf/click?upn=cBSXlkRq21E9V5onLqLCBguGO1iUd2XLcKbWoq181-2BUyGhFr5DPUD-2BLMWSZdz4ZwSvO6DTsCIhv-2BblLe13-2BKafL4OGK-2BfARC3V37Nx8NYmnniy1LrhRC9OUiLeU5VUSAQ9m28MvD3-2FPi4hQk-2Bd3C05noGpPzEOdj9WGiLVQuO-2B5yzgL6GJADZK1eyHi9CBvbIsXPtS8XleJMHxXJmsV5eA-3D-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFCgEVvHZJIBnVwrwztgYJz4eFq9BMkyZwT1fV8gU3hTKgydBXEIdOTn-2BDH-2Bd74DFcqAr1RfsGB2VGXCbeOlLUQ-2FxwsrdGpWQ0RNMzTSuGG4X8oHWy0ovA0XLk4-2FG9VisIYWc07MlTleuL39xEsYnxhzDJHKo9CeIUs-2FLjK5f-2BVIhMlhs6Ciz-2BQkETFljN00tKjnLgjErJGV1OgFnCL-2F8GPtwdoeE7Dc7b-2FeMpTmpJVilE-2FjDuu-2BIFJ-2Fafnu-2FL66ILQCXHuEKhLvd-2FfCsE3q1kwe03VrX3lzRrXj1oVsuignQZkkvYy-2F-2BTlLg-2BTDrcLZY2GOLixqY-2FMjkId918zSg210dylZVKEvcqfFBVdim75iWZJGeQKilmwQN7jMSCp9n4oU5T-2BCzmq7vClGUkrFdUpQBXdS32CDxSUmpBcvkm28A-3D-3D) Tom has only been in this race for six months and is already polling ahead of candidates who have had the spotlight for much longer. Voters are ready to tackle the climate crisis, break the corporate stranglehold on our democracy, and build a government that listens to the people — and these numbers prove it. **This exciting jump in the polls also means that Tom will be on the Democratic National Committee’s debate stage on Tuesday, January 14.** This debate is another chance to show the country that Tom is the best candidate to defeat Donald Trump and expose him as a fraud and a failure — especially when it comes to the economy. Feeling the momenTOM (I couldn’t help myself),
Heather

clean_body: | | | | Two polls were released yesterday afternoon, putting Tom second in South Carolina with 15% and third in Nevada with 12%. This proves to the country something that we’ve known all along — Tom’s message is resonating and our momentum is real! This doesn't happen overnight — it happens because of strong support from people like you, friend. We've been seeing this enthusiasm grow every day as folks come out to hear Tom and more volunteers sign up to share his message. Now, everyone across the country can see what we’re seeing on the ground. Tom has only been in this race for six months and is already polling ahead of candidates who have had the spotlight for much longer. Voters are ready to tackle the climate crisis, break the corporate stranglehold on our democracy, and build a government that listens to the people — and these numbers prove it. This exciting jump in the polls also means that Tom will be on the Democratic National Committee’s debate stage on Tuesday, January 14. This debate is another chance to show the country that Tom is the best candidate to defeat Donald Trump and expose him as a fraud and a failure — especially when it comes to the economy. name: Bill Hagerty
subject: Pelosi CAVES on impeachment
body:
Facing widespread criticism from her own party, Pelosi finally agreed to... **FIRST:** Nancy Pelosi rushed her sham impeachment through the House, in a desperate charade to undo the 2016 election.**NEXT:** She sat on the articles of impeachment for weeks and refused to send them to the Senate. **NOW:** Facing widespread criticism from her own party, Pelosi finally agreed to transmit the articles of impeachment to the Senate next week.Peter, this is why the Senate is SO CRITICAL. We need a strong conservative Senate majority that will stand up to Pelosi and defend President Trump. I'm ready to defend President Trump in the Senate, but I need your help to get there. [**Will you chip-in right now?**](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-njttjdk-akrkktjik-r/) Thank you for your time.Bill HagertyCandidate for U.S. Senate (R-TN) [DONATE NOW](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-njttjdk-akrkktjik-y/) | [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-njttjdk-akrkktjik-j/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-njttjdk-akrkktjik-t/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-njttjdk-akrkktjik-i/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-njttjdk-akrkktjik-d/)

body:

Friend,

Where have you been?

I really want to meet you, but I noticed you STILL haven’t entered to win a trip to meet me and have dinner in Palm Beach, Florida on January 17th.

The latest polling has Democrats within single digits of GOP Sen. David Perdue in Georgia — but he’s being propped up by millions of dollars from corporate PACs and Mitch McConnell's dark money groups, including some donations under FEC investigation.

Here’s the truth: Republicans and their top donors will do **anything** to hold onto this seat and protect Mitch McConnell’s fragile Senate majority.

Donald Trump and Mike Pence have already visited Georgia to help Perdue’s fundraising — **they know he’s vulnerable** — and you can count on them coming back before this is over.

[**If each of you rushed in as little as $5, we could fully fund this ad through the next week. Will you chip in to the == now? == -Matt Sent from my iPhone, please excuse typos | | | == == | | | PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ | Copyright (C) 2019 Friends of Matt Gaetz, All rights reserved. subject: Today's the day!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Bloomberg 2020
body:
Day One is officially here!

Mike Bloomberg 2020

It's Day One!

Today marks the nationwide kickoff of our campaign to defeat Donald Trump and elect Mike Bloomberg as our next president.

Volunteers and supporters across the country are hosting in-person events to share why they believe Mike’s vision for our country is the one voters should support in 2020.

There’s still time to join an event near you: Check out our list of Day One events, and RSVP to join one near you right now! (https://events.mikebloomberg.com/?utm_source=Mike+Bloomberg+2020&utm_campaign=d24cba2a14-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_01_11_02_09&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_ad56b7d956-d24cba2a14-185999893)

If you can’t make it to an event today, you still have an important role to play in making Day One a success. Let your friends and family know that you’re part of Team Bloomberg by showing your support for Mike! You can:
1. Tweet why you support Mike Bloomberg as our next president >> (https://twitter.com/intent/tweet?text=I%20am%20proud%20to%20support%20%40MikeBloomberg%20for%20President%20because%20he%20is%20the%20Democrat%20best%20positioned%20to%20bring%20Americans%20together%20and%20defeat%20Trump.%20Mike%20will%20%23GetItDone&utm_source=Mike+Bloomberg+2020&utm_campaign=d24cba2a14-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_01_11_02_09&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_ad56b7d956-d24cba2a14-185999893)
2. Share our exclusive Day One graphic with your friends & family on Facebook >>

https://www.mikebloomberg.com/announcement-video?utm_source=Mike+Bloomberg+2020&utm_campaign=d24cba2a14-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_01_11_02_09&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_ad56b7d956-d24cba2a14-185999893
Thanks - more soon

Team Bloomberg 2020

body:
Now, the Des Moines Register just released a new poll that has Elizabeth in a close second in Iowa. In fact, all four top candidates are within the poll's margin of error -- meaning any one of... | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852ba7f/45c30650/1ee1780cc/66ff48f3/3322587224/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")

**CNN: Iowa poll shows close 4-way race ahead of caucuses
Bernie Sanders: 20%
Elizabeth Warren: 17%
Pete Buttigieg: 16%
Joe Biden: 15%**

[**Donate $2 to help Elizabeth win >>**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852ba7f/45c30650/1ee1780cc/66ff48f8/3322587224/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWphbjIwZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTjQ3Rl9SRVNfTlVNX1FfMjAyMDAxMTFfVjFTM19QX1QxIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-jan20fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMN47F_RES_NUM_Q_20200111_V1S3_P_T1")
We have the team, the momentum, and the heart it's going to take to win this whole thing.

Get this: This month has already been our best start to any fundraising month since we launched this grassroots movement -- _just_ after having our best-ever end-of-quarter, best day, and best hour of fundraising at the close of December.

Now, the _Des Moines Register_ just released a new poll that has Elizabeth in a close second in Iowa. In fact, all four top candidates are within the poll's margin of error -- meaning any one of them could win. **This race is going to come down to which campaign has the most people make calls, knock on doors, and bring in the most grassroots donations in the next three weeks.**

[**We have the ground game to win this race -- but Elizabeth is not going to get there without your help. Rush a donation of $2 or whatever you can and help this grassroots movement expand our efforts in Iowa at this critical moment.**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852ba7f/45c30650/1ee1780cc/66ff48f8/3322587224/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWphbjIwZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTjQ3Rl9SRVNfTlVNX1FfMjAyMDAxMTFfVjFTM19QX1QxIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-jan20fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMN47F_RES_NUM_Q_20200111_V1S3_P_T1")

Get this: This month has already been our best start to any fundraising month since we launched this grassroots movement -- just after having our best-ever end-of-quarter, best day, and best hour of fundraising at the close of December. Now, the Des Moines Register just released a new poll that has Elizabeth in a close second in Iowa. In fact, all four top candidates are within the poll's margin of error -- meaning any one of them could win. This race is going to come down to which campaign has the most people make calls, knock on doors, and bring in the most grassroots donations in the next three weeks. body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/f6897c88b604/endorsements-dont-get-much-bigger-than-this?e=01c99b7fbd)
---
| |
---
| | Some people have a personality and an impact as big as Texas...

**Our Ag Commissioner Sid Miller is one of them.**

A Texan's Texan and a passionate supporter of President Trump’s agenda, Commissioner Miller fights for Texas every day to protect consumers, provide nutritious school lunches to our kids, and bring billions of dollars of new business to our state.

_**He also fights for our shared conservative values. And I’m proud to announce that he has endorsed our campaign for Congress!**_

---
| [ ](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=4100434613&e=01c99b7fbd)
---
| **Here's what Commissioner Miller had to say...**

_It’s not often that we get a chance to send someone of Kathaleen Wall’s character and abilities to congress. From humble beginnings on an east Texas farm to success in business and politics, she has done it all with grace, wisdom, and an abiding love of Christ._ _I don’t believe there is anyone who has done more for the Texas GOP, from registering voters to raising money, than Kathaleen.**If you support Donald Trump, the Second Amendment, and the Right to Life, you simply can’t do better.** I have been called Trump’s man in Texas and I am proud to call Kathaleen Wall my friend. I enthusiastically endorse her candidacy._
---
| Commissioner Miller’s endorsement is one more example of the momentum building for Team Wall.

**Now we need you more than ever to push our campaign forward.**

With 17 candidates running, getting the word out about this endorsement, as well as our message of supporting the President, securing the border, and protecting life, __**requires**__ your commitment.

**Join Commissioner Miller and add your name to our list of supporters:**

---
| [Add my name: Chip in $1](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=0cbce1a0ba&e=01c99b7fbd "Add my name: Chip in $1")

---
| It will truly take all of us to get this done. That’s why I urgently need your firm commitment to support President Trump’s agenda. That's why Sid Miller added his name to our list of supporters.

[**Add your name today to our team with a contribution of just $1 and together we will Keep America Great!**](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=e370240ae1&e=01c99b7fbd)

For Texas,
Kathaleen Wall

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Donald Trump: Environmental destroyer-in-chief
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Peter: Trump has kicked off the new year with a bevy of new regulation rollbacks, including dismantling half-century-old environmental regulations protecting our environment from new developments. These proposed rules would limit federal agencies from fully assessing the environmental impact of projects before construction begins. They also limit the public's ability to comment on what developments come to their communities. It's obvious what Trump is doing. He's prioritizing profits for his billionaire friends in Big Oil and Big Coal over everyday Americans and their needs. He's ensuring that dark corporate money is flowing into the 2020 election, silencing voters and keeping the government in the hands of corporations. We need engaged voters to act now: **Is Trump a danger to our environment?** [**YES**](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdfdb/6e9863e8/17aa6b27/1db0404b/4265129915/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/cS4lGp9W") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdfdb/6e9863e8/17aa6b27/1db0404b/4265129915/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/cS4lGp9W") Thank you for your commitment to the cause. -The WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdfdb/6e9863e8/17aa6b27/1db04049/4265129915/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20200111a.ND&refcode2=zMrsVql4rPPzRsAbKklG")

name: [ALERT] Research Update (via 314 Elections)
subject: extreme weather events are increasing, and it's our fault
disclaimer_text: Paid for by 314 Action Fund, 314action
body:
| This week a new study was released that showed our everyday weather now has a detectable "fingerprint" from anthropogenic climate change.

[This means that extreme weather events are now directly linked to the damage that humans continue to do to the planet. ](https://secure.314action.%3D%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314-janfr?amount=10&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=1+-+This+means+that+extreme+weather+events+a&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_30OP_200111_1_1&source=314_EM_FR_30OP_200111_1_1&refcode=314_EM_FR_30OP_200111_1_1")

We can't let this go on. That's why our plan for 2020 is to defeat 25 climate change deniers in Congress, flip the Senate, and take back the White House.

name: Cory Booker
subject: I won't be on the next debate stage
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Friend, It's official. I won't be on the January debate stage. But this is about a whole lot more than just me. Of all of the people who've qualified for the next Democratic debate stage, not one is a person of color. For a party as diverse as ours, in an election where communities of color will decide the outcome, that's wrong. I don't doubt that the rules our party set were well-intentioned, but the outcomes are undeniable: These thresholds have effectively kept people of color from the national stage. Meanwhile, the billionaires in this race have been able to spend literally hundreds of millions on ads. **This shouldn 't be about who has the most money.** [**That 's why I'm asking for your donation right now, to make sure we can get our campaign's message out to more people -- at the critical moments when voters are making up their minds.**](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cory2020-january?refcode=em_fr_20200111_CB_20200111-fr-CB-EM1-ANS_ANS_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Thanks,

Cory [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cory2020-january?refcode=em_fr_20200111_CB_20200111-fr-CB-EM1-ANS_ANS_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
---
| | Paid for by Cory 2020
---

P.O. Box 32009 Newark, NJ 07102 | All content (C) 2019 Cory 2020, All Rights Reserved.
Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, [you can add your name now to get email updates directly from Cory 2020.](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0fef/5fca0d19/7b6bcd54/291d2226/1286025106/VEsF/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter")
This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0fef/5fca0d19/7b6bcd54/291d2225/1286025106/VEsC/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0fef/5fca0d19/7b6bcd54/291d2224/1286025106/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0fef/5fca0d19/7b6bcd54/291d2223/1286025106/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0fef/5fca0d19/7b6bcd54/291d2222/1286025106/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0fef/5fca0d19/7b6bcd54/291d2226/1286025106/VEsO/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").

| | I'm checking in from Lowell where Joe is just about to hold his first of three town halls this weekend. So many people have been coming out to the town halls to talk to Joe about their concerns about our country and, more importantly, about their hopes for our future. That future starts with electing a Senator who shows up for Massachusetts. Every time. **We have 11 more town halls planned this month. name: Stacey Abrams
subject: reaching out to: dpwillis67@gmail.com
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Governors Association
body:
Team -
I hope you're ready to make some change in this country, because together, we're in a position to write our nation's next chapter. **But we cannot do it without your help.**

A better future is not only possible - it's within reach. But Republicans are doing everything in their power to hold us back. They're obstructing the Democratic process so that they can keep pushing Trump's hateful, divisive agenda.

I should know - when I ran for governor of Georgia in 2018, I faced a nearly impossible task: overcoming systemic voter suppression by a Republican Party that silenced too many voices.
That's why I'm reaching out today: **Too much is at stake to sit on the sidelines.** In every election up and down the ballot, we can reject the Trump-GOP agenda and flip red states blue, but we cannot do that without the input of dedicated supporters like you. **[Will you take a moment to take our official Democratic Outreach Survey to ensure Democrats can create a winning strategy, flip red states blue and stop the Trump agenda?](http://links.dga.mkt6018.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MTY4MTg1NzQS1&r=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&b=0&j=MTgwMDcxNjA4MAS2&mt=1&rt=0)**
**The next elections are about us. They 're our chance to fix what is broken - and to finally kick out those who broke it.**
But to claim victory on Election Day, we have a lot of work to do. We have to reach out to those who do not believe their voices matter and convince them otherwise. Because here's the thing: **Inaction can be contagious, but so can a passion for change. **

With your help, we will register every last voter, get them to the polls and prove to them that elections have the power to change their lives. **But, before we do that, we need your help setting our outreach strategy.**
**[Please Team, can I count on you to take a short survey to help Democrats win important elections across the country?](http://links.dga.mkt6018.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MTY4MTg1NzQS1&r=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&b=0&j=MTgwMDcxNjA4MAS2&mt=1&rt=0)**
Team, we can't let this fight pass us by - not after we've seen what the GOP will do to win. Change starts small, but together, I know we can lead this country toward a brighter future for everyone.
Stacey Abrams

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe from the DGA email list, [click here](https://www.pages02.net/democraticgovernorsassoc/unsubscribe/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=16818574&spUserID=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&spJobID=MTgwMDcxNjA4MAS2&spReportId=MTgwMDcxNjA4MAS2).

Paid for by Democratic Governors Association.
Contributions or gifts to the Democratic Governors Association are not tax deductible.

name: EdMarkey.com
subject: The impeachment trial will demand Ed's full attention
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Markey Committee
body:
The New York Times just reported that Speaker Pelosi plans to send the articles of impeachment to the Senate next week.
# [](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1df90/693b8b0a/4373642b/72de7580/4134192783/VEsH/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-em-2020?refcode=em_header")

Friends -
The New York Times just reported that Speaker Pelosi plans to send the articles of impeachment to the Senate next week.
[](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1df90/693b8b0a/4373642b/72de7587/4134192783/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAxMTEtYyJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-january?refcode=em200111-c")
When that happens, we expect the Senate trial to begin shortly after.
Right now, we don't know how long it will last. But no matter how long it takes, it will demand Ed's full attention.
Ed knows this is an important and historic moment for our democracy. As a Senator, he'll be a juror, and it is his job to uphold the Constitution and defend democracy.
That means there won't be much time for him to focus on our campaign's fundraising. So before the trial begins, we need to make sure we start this quarter as strong as possible.
**[Make a $3 donation today to our campaign to make sure we start strong. We would not ask if it were not critically important.](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1df90/693b8b0a/4373642b/72de7587/4134192783/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAxMTEtYyJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-january?refcode=em200111-c")**
Thank you in advance for chipping in. Your support will ensure Ed can focus on the work we expect him to do during the impeachment trial.
\- Team Markey
**[DONATE](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1df90/693b8b0a/4373642b/72de7587/4134192783/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAxMTEtYyJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-january?refcode=em200111-c")**

* * *
Paid for by The Markey Committee
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email. To support Senator Ed Markey with a contribution, [click here](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1df90/693b8b0a/4373642b/72de7585/4134192783/VEsA/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-em-2020?refcode=em_footer").

subject: The Senate is poised to reward Trump for endangering national security
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:

| | Peter \-- Trump's actions toward Iran are sending this country dangerously close toward the precipice of war to satisfy his ego, all after he was impeached for placing his own personal interests ahead of national security and interest when he asked Ukraine to investigate the Bidens. Now, the Senate is ready to exonerate him for his wrongdoing and move on instead do its job and thoroughly piece together the story. It's obvious the destruction Trump is causing this country will not end as long as he is in office \-- we need 5,000 people to join us today and call on the Senate to stop playing political games with the future of America and global peace, so if you agree with us, please add your name here: [**Demand the Senate remove Donald Trump >>**](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdfd4/6e9863e8/17a795cb/1db0404c/3446953352/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/hbF1x9cio") Thank you so much for standing with us in this fight. name: Gary
subject: Mitch McConnell and the GOP
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PETERS FOR MICHIGAN Peters for Michigan
body:
ALL IN to defeat me in Michigan
| | | [](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6da942/5721a3ed/705204ee/efb5167/1678280850/VEsH/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://petersformichigan.com/")
---
Friend: Mitch McConnell and the GOP are ALL IN to defeat me in Michigan.

**They know whoever wins here will control the Senate and the future of the Supreme Court** - and that's why dark money GOP groups are also spending more to defeat me than any other in-cycle Democratic senator.

Having run many hard-fought campaigns before, trust me when I say, I know we can win and take back the Senate for Democrats.

But right now, polling shows me statistically tied with my opponent. Time and time again, I've watched Mitch McConnell let the Senate cater to President Trump's beck and call, including the confirmation of two hard-right Supreme Court justices.

**So right now, it has never been more important for Democrats to win back the Senate majority. That's why my team set a 5,000 Election Year Donor Goal, but right now, we're 3,671 donors short. **
Missing this goal means we could lose in Michigan and give up Democrats' best chance of taking back the Senate. **[So please, will you give $3 or more right now to become an Election-Year Donor, win in Michigan and take back the Senate for Democrats?](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6da942/5721a3ed/705204ee/efb5166/1678280850/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoicGV0ZXJzX2VtYWlsIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJqdGsyMzEtZnItbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCIsImUzc2dZV0p5WldOMWNuSnBibWNnZlgwPSI6IiZyZWN1cnJpbmc9MSJ9/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/peters_email?refcode=jtk231-fr-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1")**

body:
|
#
Folks, I'll cut to the chase. My team's a bit worried we'll miss our $100,000 grassroots fundraising goal next week. If we do, it means we'll start out 2020 on the wrong foot -- so I told them I'd reach out to a few folks like you. **If you can, would you please add a donation to our campaign for U.S. Senate? That's why this weekly goal matters -- it keeps us on track to make sure we have the necessary resources to respond and fight back at a moment's notice.

name: Wilmot Collins
subject: Standing with women
disclaimer_text: Paid for by A Whole Lot of Folks for Wilmot Collins
body:
Recently, the Supreme Court declined to hear a case regarding a Kentucky law that requires doctors to conduct an ultrasound and play fetal heartbeat a | | | [](http://links.wilmotcollins.com/u/click?_t=9d604abc9de24d9a90a97f1ff916f905&_m=7926b7ea070649eba0094c28630ab5ee&_e=g0dIP4wTRLoIADYFwsdKFIVV7TioR7HFpCg7zfnNUNoIOecydXNMJBlxx10S9jpEQEsPnFHuoiUtLy_TlBRT7yaUwbx7RW9Z4E336-C-0DklWGsllPXvo2tuexS2Kkkp6yiRrPi3A1TZIWWbUU7trXOR4D1xltkiy8ysqS_TIHCSAmQ8o2xyhObug4_dp5BTJHHrzArzzoXxfNhz28kFl3_Zwoj7Vz8frFsKzW8iU92yGHQ8r5cEZvkqRjjaPOCmyH3LvaylS_oS0-kJ-E7pwSYf22dtkyauK-ram19fDjsyNlpG27KVE9e8AmIUQ0hNuKDtd_F01r_FBv2Nx71w8XSTHxthI_WUB8jZQRWnPj0%3D) Recently, the Supreme Court declined to hear a case regarding a Kentucky law that requires doctors to conduct an ultrasound and play fetal heartbeat audio to pregnant women before an abortion. This law is a cruel tactic that guilts and coerces women into making a decision that might not be the right one for them or their families. Women need to make these hard decisions for themselves, without manipulative tactics from Republican lawmakers. [**Sign this petition if you want to fight back against anti-choice laws and demand the Supreme Court take action to protect a women’s right to choose.**](http://links.wilmotcollins.com/u/click?_t=9d604abc9de24d9a90a97f1ff916f905&_m=7926b7ea070649eba0094c28630ab5ee&_e=g0dIP4wTRLoIADYFwsdKFIVV7TioR7HFpCg7zfnNUNoIOecydXNMJBlxx10S9jpEQEsPnFHuoiUtLy_TlBRT7yaUwbx7RW9Z4E336-C-0DklWGsllPXvo2tuexS2Kkkp6yiRrPi3A1TZIWWbUU7trX_gu2FzlKSSWDHF99JSJvcdJhC9kv37inT0Qj9cBK7-SbPuztmN0ccowiYKLzss_y1ItFXfPA5HRmpA3A2rSrsvCQ-9vn4Psm5V7CaTQZQEkZ4v6r89s9YdEHQiPlgMt60H8CHEvoFXAGVicT1lLLwp9ibWfANMqPbD-kM-NdqEsbwlP8R0GAKY_7u2SGlONjY9NpJ2l4Epedv6xxY1vAU%3D) [>> Sign here <<](http://links.wilmotcollins.com/u/click?_t=9d604abc9de24d9a90a97f1ff916f905&_m=7926b7ea070649eba0094c28630ab5ee&_e=g0dIP4wTRLoIADYFwsdKFIVV7TioR7HFpCg7zfnNUNoIOecydXNMJBlxx10S9jpEQEsPnFHuoiUtLy_TlBRT7yaUwbx7RW9Z4E336-C-0DklWGsllPXvo2tuexS2Kkkp6yiRrPi3A1TZIWWbUU7trRN6LDL5gV7vnNyERAM-TgbCT9WDzpZFHJNdjNJnc2WAzyGvVODytOlblSMhnV2qF_nDl44BQOe6yxN9ekKPL5LFFJlnARCioDw5qM6AOJlHR7CQrufogQk1uSEy08kkTLy3J7OXFYbDiKxEPLUrLsDHUgO9yzoGO2omDzikNRmUv8p8SWmR9tYWmuHb1FkOD2vMfdJSetZun7hE27YDb0Q%3D) This law isn’t only cruel, it is unconstitutional. This not only infringes on a women’s medical autonomy, but it violates the First Amendment rights of doctors. This Kentucky law is yet another law in a recent string of legislation with the goal of chipping away at _Roe v. Wade,_ and we need to know that the highest court in the land is on the side of women, not those who want to control them. [**Sign here to add your name to protect women’s rights. We can’t sit idly by as half the population is being attacked by an onslaught of ultra-conservative laws restricting their freedoms.**](http://links.wilmotcollins.com/u/click?_t=9d604abc9de24d9a90a97f1ff916f905&_m=7926b7ea070649eba0094c28630ab5ee&_e=g0dIP4wTRLoIADYFwsdKFIVV7TioR7HFpCg7zfnNUNoIOecydXNMJBlxx10S9jpEQEsPnFHuoiUtLy_TlBRT7yaUwbx7RW9Z4E336-C-0DklWGsllPXvo2tuexS2Kkkp6yiRrPi3A1TZIWWbUU7trQBYKYb22IQdUV-ybVevx55gToUVnZece1MeoVkzBOVkLL3pAHLrNnsLI7X2Uk8KVErK_RQcEgP84MS3wUJcrT0MbUATyWXmavzknNierVqnpBDB8tL4WuxppyZHIpjLq1HLlM4BNe3fWON1HtNhcWdU1lU2jY54UpF8Bc_BoM0HbwDSZi6nivBlH4McOZ1vjHtcrNrvxJes-A2YVRahucE%3D) \-- Wilmot Collins

Wilmot Collins is Montana’s first black mayor, a 20+ year U.S. military Veteran, a refugee and now, a U.S. Senate candidate. As Montana’s next Senator, Wilmot will prioritize fighting climate change, making healthcare a human right, job creation and economic opportunity, supporting our veterans, improving our public schools and keeping public lands in public hands. [CONTRIBUTE](http://links.wilmotcollins.com/u/click?_t=9d604abc9de24d9a90a97f1ff916f905&_m=7926b7ea070649eba0094c28630ab5ee&_e=g0dIP4wTRLoIADYFwsdKFNaPI418JT43xUNCagMlzxRB4ITFmynzwKAT53ILRSG015u8NsKTwReQvnDFAQAIWzkEF2MGsDsm_XY2n4Sj0rded6yIHSo7X0bNFCkQW3zV5xgSOwSthrFdtFSzVscuyO-_edVyuk1OyvoFzxLla9SVli8RQEUXh6vdYc8mVb7cO-rvHavqVv-PdopOGpmIdrZFI4yk-pQVG8sA5zetDT2SzOCKdTW6zuQ_nni12_knMyKCBZ9WREnjpSIemUWF-P6Lna8mVmWUu3v6WbPOqcTEuU-yThlVgeUezH5WoYL8R-rifUuVHPYip0CFXXhbZ8RJiUV7yCpkxbQxYQdXfCJKSKZ7FNR_5Mp4n5B-Cwnha_z5ivtaryhu2JgtM3Z9q4qWGIQDrmCvCP8PqVUt9OHh1FivgUt82lh33v3mpS4p1lDvQUk71Adue_ReGcmeYu5eoxn3PdTZ4ku4FdPNl6g%3D)

name: Team Sara
subject: Bad news.
body:
It's everything people hate about politics.
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802e75/4bef7a87/6af6d12f/287f84f3/583450479/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

I have bad news -
**One Nation, a Republican dark money group aligned with Mitch McConnell, launched nearly half a million dollars in ads supporting Susan Collins yesterday.**
Our ability to respond depends on people like you, because the overwhelming majority of the donations we receive come from people giving small amounts. That's why we have to ask:
[**Will you rush a $3 contribution to support Sara Gideon 's campaign and help us respond to these ads?**](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802e75/4bef7a87/6af6d12f/287f84f2/583450479/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAxMTEtZnVsbCJ9/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-jan-2020?refcode=em200111-full")
Look, it's clear these guys are paying Collins back for her support on impeachment. Just this week, she backed McConnell's plan to block all witness testimony during the Senate impeachment trial - and now they're running ads for her?
We're sick and tired of Susan Collins' favor returning brand of politics - which is why we're more committed than ever to electing Sara Gideon, a leader who won't be beholden to Mitch McConnell or special interest groups in Washington.
But we'll need your help to do it, so please, [**chip in now.**](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802e75/4bef7a87/6af6d12f/287f84f2/583450479/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAxMTEtZnVsbCJ9/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-jan-2020?refcode=em200111-full")
\- Team Sara

"" I have bad news - One Nation, a Republican dark money group aligned with Mitch McConnell, launched nearly half a million dollars in ads supporting Susan Collins yesterday. Our ability to respond depends on people like you, because the overwhelming majority of the donations we receive come from people giving small amounts. That's why we have to ask: "" Look, it's clear these guys are paying Collins back for her support on impeachment. Just this week, she backed McConnell's plan to block all witness testimony during the Senate impeachment trial - and now they're running ads for her? We're sick and tired of Susan Collins' favor returning brand of politics - which is why we're more committed than ever to electing Sara Gideon, a leader who won't be beholden to Mitch McConnell or special interest groups in Washington. But we'll need your help to do it, so please, "" \- Team Sara ******** ""****** Sara Gideon for Maine PO Box 812 South Freeport, ME 04078

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Tell Mitch McConnell: We demand a fair impeachment trial
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hello Peter, Congressional Republicans aren't even trying to hide their corruption and collusion with the White House. During the House hearings, they stormed secure hearing rooms, tried to expose the name of the whistleblower, and complained at every turn that the process was unfair to the president after he refused to participate in it. Now, the Senate, led by Mitch McConnell and Lindsey Graham, are touting their close coordination with Trump and desire to exonerate him before they've even received the articles of impeachment, let alone started the trial. They refuse to see new evidence, read the transcripts, or hear from new witnesses. What we're about to see is a sham trial that will only serve to further erode our institutions and our democracy. [**We need engaged Democrats to join us in calling on the Senate to stop these shenanigans and hold a fair trial. We 're looking to have 10,000 names next to ours by the end of the day, so please add yours NOW>>**](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdfdc/6e9863e8/17a19bf0/1db04056/745255012/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://www.paction.us/impeachment-trial/when_democrats_turn_out_PAC") Thank you for standing with us, The WDTO Team [ADD YOUR NAME](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdfdc/6e9863e8/17a19bf0/1db04056/745255012/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://www.paction.us/impeachment-trial/when_democrats_turn_out_PAC")

John Hickenlooper is a trained scientist, and has worked tirelessly for Coloradans ever since he was elected mayor of Denver. He is a champion on climate and is fighting to protect Colorado's public lands and for bold action against the climate crisis.

As Governor of Colorado, Hick made his state the first in the country to pass rules and regulations that limit the amount of methane that leaks out of tanks, pipelines, wells, and other facilities.

Cory Gardner is simply Mitch McConnell's crony and one of President Trump's favorite Senators. Senator Gardner will do nothing to combat the climate crisis, and his inaction could have a devastating impact on one of our country's most beautiful states.

**That is why we are working to ensure that Hick defeats Gardner this year.**

[Can you chip in now to support Hick's campaign and ensure that one of Trump's favorite Republicans Senators is defeated?](https://secure.314action.%3D%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314_monthly_hicksenatefund?amount=10&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=10+-+Can+you+chip+in+now+to+support+Hickrsquo&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_30OP_200111_2_1&source=314_EM_FR_30OP_200111_2_1&refcode=314_EM_FR_30OP_200111_2_1")

314 Action Team

name: MJ Hegar Alert
subject: "If she's the nominee, she will defeat him."
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
It's clear that Texans are ready for change, and MJ is the one who can bring it.

|

[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489079d/7f51f7bc/4ae47fcb/4ef02f69/3278946991/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Hey Peter,

**" If she's the nominee, she will defeat him."**

That's what Beto O'Rourke said about MJ's campaign against Senator Cornyn. | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489079d/7f51f7bc/4ae47fcb/4ef02f68/3278946991/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijc0NSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-betogif?refcode=email_20200111.2nd__745__&amount=10&recurring=true")

name: Tina Smith
subject: The American Dream
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
We're facing our very first fundraising deadline of 2020, and I need you to add a donation to our fight to keep Minnesota blue before time runs out.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200111-mm1?refcode=em200111-mm1&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10") I need your help, friend.

**We're facing our very first fundraising deadline of 2020, and I need you to add a donation to our fight to keep Minnesota blue before time runs out:** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200111-mm1?refcode=em200111-mm1&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=10")

---
| | [OTHER »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200111-mm1?refcode=em200111-mm1&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
---
Here's why:

It has been a little over one year since folks like you elected me to the U.S. Senate. I have had the honor of serving you and let me tell you: **Every single day I am grateful to raise your voice in this fight.**

The best part of my job is making a meaningful difference for local communities right here in Minnesota and supporting our common values of freedom, fairness, and opportunity for all.

One of those places, in particular, is the city of Duluth in Northeastern Minnesota. As I've heard from leaders across this region, there is a lot of work to be done. And that is why I'm so excited they will soon see more than $1 billion to invest in transportation and hospital improvements.

Not only that, but the community in Grand Marais is facing several health care challenges right now as they struggle to maintain local services and retain doctors. In response, I introduced two bipartisan measures to improve access and bring down costs.

**Whether it's the folks in Duluth or in Grand Marais, I'm committed to eliminating barriers so ALL Minnesotans can share in the American Dream.**

No matter what, I'm committed to doing my job in the Senate and working hard to ensure all Minnesotans have access to opportunity. That's why it's so important we do everything we can to keep our state from turning red this year.

**One of the best ways you can help me protect this Democratic Senate seat and keep delivering for the people of Minnesota is by making a donation toward our very first fundraising goal of the year. I promise it's important.**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
| [$10 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200111-mm1?refcode=em200111-mm1&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=10")

---
| [$50 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200111-mm1?refcode=em200111-mm1&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=50")
---
| | [$100 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200111-mm1?refcode=em200111-mm1&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=100")
---
| [$250 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200111-mm1?refcode=em200111-mm1&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=250")
---
| | [OTHER »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200111-mm1?refcode=em200111-mm1&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
---
We have a lot to accomplish in 2020 and beyond, folks. I'm fighting as hard as I can for you in the Senate. Thanks for fighting for me, too.

-- Tina

name: ElizabethWarren.com
subject: If you make calls to Iowa this weekend, Elizabeth may call you!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
Talking with caucus-goers this weekend is one of the most important things you can do to help us win in Iowa and beyond. And if you can make calls now, Elizabeth might call to thank you: | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852bba1/45c30650/1efd00497/66ff6b94/562814060/VEsH/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com/call")
---
With only 23 days until the Iowa caucuses, the conversations we have with Iowans right now couldn't be more important. And if you make calls today, Elizabeth might give you a call to thank you!

**[Click here to start making calls to Iowa caucus-goers right now, and sign up for a shift or two another time this weekend-- and make sure to keep your phone nearby. Elizabeth might just give you a call, too!](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852bba1/45c30650/1efd00497/66ff6b99/562814060/VEsE/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.elizabethwarren.com/call")**

Everyone has a different reason for being in this fight, and sharing your reasons with caucus-goers who might just be tuning in to this race could make all the difference on caucus night.

**Talking with caucus-goers this weekend is one of the most important things you can do to help us win in Iowa and beyond. And if you can make calls now, Elizabeth might call to thank you:** | **[**MAKE CALLS NOW**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852bba1/45c30650/1efd00497/66ff6b99/562814060/VEsF/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.elizabethwarren.com/call")**

Team Warren
